subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed at an hour when sorrows encompassed Him from a deceitful betrayer, whereby the heart of Paradise was set aflame [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن فی حین احاطته الاحزان من خادع ماکر احترق منه قلب الفردوس
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
